translations.es: Por desgracia, el chocolate es mi vicio.
translations.fr: Malheureusement, le chocolat est mon péché mignon.
translations.it: Purtroppo la cioccolata è il mio vizio.
translations.zh-Hans: 不幸的是，巧克力是我的弱点。
translations.yue: 可惜朱古力係我嘅弱點。
translations.pt: Infelizmente, o chocolate é meu vício.
translations.vi: Tiếc là sô cô la là điểm yếu của tôi.
translations.hi: दुर्भाग्य से चॉकलेट मेरी कमजोरी है.
translations.el: Δυστυχώς, η σοκολάτα είναι η αδυναμία μου.
translations.ro: Din păcate, ciocolata este slăbiciunea mea.
translations.ja: 残念ながらチョコレートは私の弱点です。

tokens.explanation: Common noun, feminine, singular; nominative subject of the copular clause.
Finite copula, present, 3rd person singular; links subject to the predicative noun.
Sentence adverb expressing speaker attitude; scopes over the whole proposition.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular), attributive; agrees with neuter singular noun in nominative; no ending here.
Common noun, neuter, singular; predicate nominative (predicative complement). Here means ‘vice’ (not ‘lorry’).

sentences.target: Er hat sein Laster endlich aufgegeben.

translations.de: Er hat sein Laster endlich aufgegeben.
translations.en: He finally gave up his vice.
translations.fr: Il a enfin abandonné son vice.
translations.it: Ha finalmente abbandonato il suo vizio.
translations.zh-Hans: 他终于戒掉了他的恶习。
translations.ru: Он наконец бросил свою вредную привычку.
translations.he: הוא סוף סוף ויתר על ההרגל הרע שלו.
translations.vi: Anh ấy cuối cùng đã bỏ thói xấu của mình.
translations.ar: لقد تخلّى أخيرًا عن عادته السيئة.
translations.nl: Hij heeft zijn slechte gewoonte eindelijk opgegeven.
translations.uk: Він нарешті покинув свою шкідливу звичку.
translations.hi: उसने आखिरकार अपनी बुरी आदत छोड़ दी.
translations.el: Επιτέλους εγκατέλειψε την κακή του συνήθεια.
translations.nb: Han ga endelig opp sin dårlige vane.
translations.sv: Han gav äntligen upp sin dåliga vana.
translations.ro: În sfârșit a renunțat la viciul lui.
translations.da: Han droppede endelig sin dårlige vane.
translations.ja: 彼はついに悪い癖をやめた。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; subject.
Auxiliary verb, present, 3rd person singular; forms the perfect tense.
Possessive determiner (3rd person singular), attributive; agrees with neuter singular noun in accusative; no ending here.
Common noun, neuter, singular; direct object in accusative (object of ‘aufgeben’).
Adverb of time/aspect marking completion after delay; modifies the verbal complex.
Past participle of separable verb ‘aufgeben’; main lexical verb in perfect construction; separable prefix is attached in the participle (not split here).

sentences.target: Ich kämpfe noch mit diesem Laster.

translations.de: Ich kämpfe noch mit diesem Laster.
translations.en: I'm still struggling with this vice.
translations.fr: Je me bats encore contre cette mauvaise habitude.
translations.it: Sto ancora lottando con questo vizio.
translations.ko: 저는 아직 그 나쁜 습관과 싸우고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我还在和这个恶习斗争。
translations.yue: 我仲喺度同呢個壞習慣鬥緊。
translations.ru: Я всё ещё борюсь с этой вредной привычкой.
translations.pt: Ainda estou lutando com esse vício.
translations.he: אני עדיין מתקשה עם ההרגל הזה.
translations.vi: Tôi vẫn đang vật lộn với thói xấu này.
translations.nl: Ik worstel nog steeds met deze gewoonte.
translations.uk: Я все ще борюся з цією звичкою.
translations.hu: Még mindig küzdök ezzel a szokással.
translations.hi: मैं अभी भी इस आदत से जूझ रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Wciąż zmagam się z tym nałogiem.
translations.el: Ακόμα παλεύω με αυτή τη συνήθεια.
translations.nb: Jeg sliter fortsatt med denne vanen.
translations.id: Saya masih berjuang dengan kebiasaan ini.
translations.sv: Jag kämpar fortfarande med den här vanan.
translations.ro: Încă mă lupt cu acest viciu.
translations.da: Jeg kæmper stadig med den her vane.
translations.ja: 私はまだこの癖と戦っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, present, 1st person singular; takes a prepositional object with ‘mit’.
Temporal/degree adverb indicating continuation.
Preposition governing dative; introduces the prepositional object.
Demonstrative determiner, dative neuter singular; agrees with ‘Laster’.
Common noun, neuter, singular; object of the preposition ‘mit’ in dative.

sentences.target: Ihr einziges Laster ist teurer Kaffee.

translations.de: Ihr einziges Laster ist teurer Kaffee.
translations.en: Her only vice is expensive coffee.
translations.es: Su único vicio es el café caro.
translations.fr: Son seul péché mignon, c’est le café cher.
translations.it: Il suo unico vizio è il caffè costoso.
translations.zh-Hans: 她唯一的恶习是昂贵的咖啡。
translations.yue: 佢唯一嘅壞習慣係飲貴嘅咖啡。
translations.pt: O único vício dela é o café caro.
translations.he: החולשה היחידה שלה היא קפה יקר.
translations.vi: Thói xấu duy nhất của cô ấy là cà phê đắt tiền.
translations.ar: عيبها الوحيد هو القهوة הבاهظة الثمن.
translations.nl: Haar enige zwakte is dure koffie.
translations.hu: Az egyetlen gyengéje a drága kávé.
translations.hi: उसकी एकमात्र कमजोरी महँगी कॉफी है.
translations.pl: Jej jedyną słabością jest droga kawa.
translations.el: Η μοναδική της αδυναμία είναι ο ακριβός καφές.
translations.nb: Hennes eneste svakhet er dyr kaffe.
translations.sv: Hennes enda svaghet är dyrt kaffe.
translations.ro: Singurul ei viciu este cafeaua scumpă.
translations.cs: Její jediná slabost je drahá káva.
translations.da: Hendes eneste svaghed er dyr kaffe.
translations.fi: Hänen ainoa heikkoutensa on kallis kahvi.
translations.ja: 彼女の唯一の弱点は高いコーヒーです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (3rd person; could mean ‘her’/‘their’/formal ‘Your’), attributive; nominative neuter singular agreement with ‘Laster’.
Attributive adjective with strong ending -es (no article, possessive determiner present); modifies ‘Laster’ in nominative neuter singular.
Common noun, neuter, singular; subject NP of the copular clause.
Finite copula, present, 3rd person singular; links subject to the predicate nominal.
Attributive adjective in predicate NP; nominative masculine singular with strong ending -er (no article before ‘Kaffee’).
Common noun, masculine, singular; head of the predicate nominal (‘teurer Kaffee’).

Ich kämpfe noch mit diesem Laster.
Ihr einziges Laster ist teurer Kaffee.
de: Er hat sein Laster endlich aufgegeben.
Ich kämpfe noch mit diesem Laster.
Ihr einziges Laster ist teurer Kaffee.
en: He finally gave up his vice.
I'm still struggling with this vice.
Her only vice is expensive coffee.
